title: GateRunSummary
description: Summary of evaluating all criteria in a spec.

enforcement.description: Enforcement-level breakdown of results (excludes skipped criteria).

results.description: Results for each criterion that was evaluated or skipped.

skipped.description: Number of criteria skipped (descriptive-only, no cmd).

total_duration_ms.description: Total wall-clock duration for all evaluations in milliseconds.

Confidence.description: Agent confidence level in an evaluation.

oneOf.description: High confidence — clear evidence supports the conclusion.
Medium confidence — evidence is suggestive but not conclusive.
Low confidence — uncertain; evaluation may need human review.

CriterionResult.description: A criterion paired with its evaluation result.

criterion_name.description: The name of the criterion that was evaluated.

enforcement.description: Resolved enforcement level for this criterion (Required or Advisory).

result.description: The gate result, or `None` if skipped (no cmd).

Enforcement.description:
Enforcement level for a gate criterion.

Determines whether a criterion failure blocks the gate (required)
or is informational only (advisory).

oneOf.description: Failure blocks the gate. This is the default.
Failure is informational; does not block the gate.

EnforcementSummary.description:
Enforcement breakdown in a gate run summary.

Always present on `GateRunSummary`, with counts defaulting to 0.
Only counts executable criteria (skipped criteria are excluded).

advisory_failed.description: Number of advisory criteria that failed.

advisory_passed.description: Number of advisory criteria that passed.

required_failed.description: Number of required criteria that failed.

required_passed.description: Number of required criteria that passed.

EvaluatorRole.description:
The role of the evaluator who produced a gate result.

Determines trust level and audit requirements:
- `SelfEval` ("self"): the coding agent evaluates its own work (default for v0.2).
- `Independent`: a separate agent evaluates (planned for v0.3).
- `Human`: a human performed the evaluation.

oneOf.description: The coding agent evaluates its own work.

GateKind.description:
The kind of gate to evaluate.

Uses internal tagging (`#[serde(tag = "kind")]`) so TOML output includes
a `kind = "Command"` or `kind = "AlwaysPass"` discriminator field.

oneOf.description: A gate that runs a shell command and checks its exit code.
A gate that always passes — useful for placeholder or manual gates.
A gate that checks whether a file exists at the given path.

path.description: Path to check, relative to the working directory.

oneOf.description: A gate evaluated by an agent via structured reasoning.

A gate that counts events of a specific type in the agent session log.

`event_type` must match the serde tag of an `AgentEvent` variant:
`"tool_called"`, `"tool_result"`, `"turn_ended"`, `"session_stopped"`,
`"text_delta"`, `"text_block"`.

Passes when `count >= min.unwrap_or(0) && count <= max.unwrap_or(u32::MAX)`.

event_type.description: The event type to count, matching an `AgentEvent` serde tag.

max.description: Inclusive upper bound on the matched event count. `None` means no upper bound.

min.description: Inclusive lower bound on the matched event count. `None` means no lower bound.

oneOf.description:
A gate that passes only when no tool invocation in the session returned an error.

Fails if any `AgentEvent::ToolResult { is_error: true, .. }` is present.

GateResult.description:
The result of evaluating a gate.

Captures whether the gate passed, the command output (if any), timing,
and which kind of gate produced this result (self-describing via `kind`).

confidence.description:
Agent's confidence level in the evaluation.
Only populated for `AgentReport` gates.

duration_ms.description: How long the gate took to evaluate, in milliseconds.

evaluator_role.description:
Role of the evaluator who produced this result.
Only populated for `AgentReport` gates.

evidence.description:
What the agent observed (concrete facts).
Only populated for `AgentReport` gates.

exit_code.description:
Exit code from the gate command, if applicable.
Omitted from serialized output when `None` (e.g., for `AlwaysPass` gates).

kind.description: Which gate kind produced this result.

original_bytes.description:
Original byte count before truncation.
Omitted from serialized output when `None`.

reasoning.description:
Why those facts lead to pass/fail.
Only populated for `AgentReport` gates.

stderr.description:
Standard error captured from the gate command.
Omitted from serialized output when empty.

stdout.description:
Standard output captured from the gate command.
Omitted from serialized output when empty.

truncated.description:
Whether stdout or stderr was truncated due to size limits.
Omitted from serialized output when false.
